product_overview: NextPOS is a real-time, web-based Point of Sale (POS) system for restaurants, cafés and delivery operations that supports cashier, waiter, kitchen and courier workflows plus public QR/kiosk customer ordering. It provides fast authentication (username/password or PIN), order lifecycle management, and guest ordering without requiring an account.
core_goals: Enable staff to authenticate quickly and access role-appropriate POS screens (cashier, waiter, kitchen, courier).
Allow cashiers and waiters to create, modify and submit orders, apply discounts/coupons, and complete payments at the terminal.
Provide kitchen staff a focused monitor to progress orders through preparation states so front-of-house is kept in sync.
Allow guests to open a public QR or kiosk menu, build an order and submit it without creating an account.
Give couriers a lightweight PWA panel to accept, pickup and complete deliveries with minimal friction.

features.name: Login (username/password)
features.description: Authenticate to the POS by entering a tenant identifier plus username and password to reach the role-appropriate main screen.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter Tenant UUID -> Enter username -> Enter password -> Submit login -> See role-appropriate main screen

features.name: Login (PIN)
features.description: Quick authentication using a Tenant UUID and a short numeric PIN to open the user's POS panel.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter Tenant UUID -> Enter PIN -> Submit login -> See role-appropriate main screen

features.name: Cashier Order Flow
features.description: Create an order from the menu, apply coupons or discounts, select a payment method and complete payment so an order record is created.
user_flows: Navigate to /cashier -> Browse menu and select a product -> Add selected product to cart -> Apply valid coupon or discount -> Choose payment method (cash or card) -> Complete payment -> See order created confirmation

Navigate to /cashier -> Browse menu and select a product -> Add selected product to cart -> Apply invalid coupon or discount -> See coupon validation error -> Remove or bypass coupon -> Complete payment -> See order created confirmation

features.name: Kitchen Progression
features.description: Kitchen staff view incoming orders and advance each order through preparation states until completion, keeping POS in sync.
user_flows: Navigate to /kitchen -> Locate a new order in the list -> Change order status to Preparing -> Change order status to Ready -> Change order status to Completed -> See updated status reflected in POS

features.name: Waiter Table Session
features.description: Waiters start a table session, add items over time, send orders to the kitchen and resume sessions to continue or close them later.
user_flows: Navigate to /waiter -> Select a table and start a session -> Add products to the table session -> Send order from session to kitchen -> Leave session and reopen session -> See previously added items in session

features.name: Public QR Menu Guest Order
features.description: Guests open a public or table-scoped QR menu, build a basket, provide guest details at checkout, and submit a public order without an account.
user_flows: Navigate to /qr -> Browse the menu and select items -> Add selected items to cart -> Proceed to checkout -> Enter guest details -> Submit public order -> See order confirmation

features.name: Courier Delivery
features.description: Couriers use a mobile-optimized panel to view assigned deliveries, mark pickup and delivery milestones, and update delivery status.
user_flows: Navigate to /courier -> Locate an assigned delivery in the list -> Mark order as picked up -> Mark order as delivered -> See delivery status updated

routes.description: Tenant ID ile giriş (username/password veya PIN)

features.name: Login (username/password)
features.description: Tenant ID seçip kullanıcı adı/şifre ile giriş yapılır
user_interactions: Rolüne göre ana ekrana yönlendirildiğini doğrula

features.name: Login (PIN)
features.description: Tenant ID + PIN ile hızlı giriş yapılır

features.name: Cashier Order Flow
features.description: Ürün ekle, kampanya/indirim uygula, ödeme al, fiş/çıktı
user_interactions: Menüden ürün seç ve sepete ekle
Ödemeyi tamamla ve sipariş oluştuğunu doğrula

features.name: Kitchen Progression
features.description: Mutfak ekranında siparişleri hazırlama→hazır→tamam akışında ilerlet

features.name: Waiter Table Session
features.description: Masa oturumu başlat, sipariş ekle, mutfağa gönder, devam ettir
user_interactions: Oturumdan çıkıp tekrar girerek devamı doğrula

features.name: Public QR Menu Guest Order
features.description: QR menüde ürün ekle, misafir checkout ile sipariş ver
user_interactions: Misafir bilgilerini gir ve siparişi oluştur

features.name: Courier Delivery
features.description: Kurye siparişi alır, yola çıktı ve teslim edildi adımlarını işaretler

known_limitations.issue: SaaS Admin ve Reseller uygulamaları ayrı Vite uygulamalarıdır (farklı port/URL)
known_limitations.impact: Bu code_summary 5173 POS uygulamasına odaklıdır; diğer uygulamalar için ayrı TestSprite koşusu gerekir.
